title: Squirrel Removal in Prospect Lefferts Gardens | $900-$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal in Prospect Lefferts Gardens, Brooklyn. Humane trapping, exclusion & attic cleanup. Serving historic homes near Prospect Park. Call today for fast service!
intro: Squirrels are a common nuisance in Prospect Lefferts Gardens, where tree-lined streets and proximity to Prospect Park create ideal habitats for these persistent pests. Homeowners in this vibrant Brooklyn neighborhood often face issues with squirrels nesting in attics, chewing through soffits, and damaging insulation in both classic brownstones and newer residential buildings. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive squirrel removal services tailored to the unique architecture and wildlife challenges of Prospect Lefferts Gardens.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has extensive experience serving Prospect Lefferts Gardens' diverse housing stock, from pre-war multi-family homes to Victorian-era properties. Our technicians understand the specific entry points common in local buildings and use humane, effective methods to remove squirrels and prevent re-entry, all while respecting the neighborhood's historic character.
localContext: Prospect Lefferts Gardens' beautiful tree canopy along streets like Maple and Fenimore provides excellent squirrel habitat, while the neighborhood's proximity to Prospect Park means wildlife populations remain robust year-round. The area's mix of limestone townhouses, vintage apartment buildings, and single-family homes each present unique vulnerability points where squirrels commonly gain attic and roof access.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Prospect Lefferts Gardens?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal services in Prospect Lefferts Gardens typically range from $900 to $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of exclusion work needed. Larger homes or those with significant attic damage may fall on the higher end, while simpler cases with single-entry points cost less. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning work.

faqs.question: Why are squirrels so common in Prospect Lefferts Gardens?
faqs.answer: Prospect Lefferts Gardens' mature trees, proximity to Prospect Park, and abundance of older homes with accessible entry points make it ideal squirrel habitat. The neighborhood's tree-lined streets provide ample food sources and nesting opportunities, while gaps in soffits, roof vents, and deteriorating fascia boards common in historic buildings offer easy attic access for squirrels seeking shelter.

faqs.question: What does the squirrel removal process involve?
faqs.answer: Our squirrel removal process includes a thorough inspection to identify entry points and assess damage, humane trapping and removal of all squirrels, complete exclusion work to seal all potential entry points with durable materials, attic cleanup and sanitation if needed, and insulation repair or replacement when damaged. We also provide warranty coverage to ensure squirrels don't return.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Prospect Lefferts Gardens home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for most Prospect Lefferts Gardens residents. The complete removal process typically takes 3-7 days depending on the number of squirrels and whether babies are present. Active trapping usually captures squirrels within 24-48 hours, followed by exclusion work to permanently seal your home and prevent future infestations.
